verified_commit_subject: Define R9 isolated QA signoff packet
closeout_commit_subject: Define R9 isolated QA signoff packet

support_packet_commit_policy.statement: The support packet is created after closeout push, is not inside the same closeout commit it verifies, and may be published by a follow-up support commit or by an external artifact identity.

verification_method.notes: Remote branch head query model only; this does not claim CI or external runner proof.

non_claims: no CI or external runner claim unless an actual run identity exists
